privileged_info_summary: The post_op_followup_audit task uses synthetic test data with 6 controlled scenarios to audit cataract surgery follow-up compliance. The task verifies that agents correctly identify 3 non-compliant patients (GUID_2: no follow-up, GUID_3: Day 31 follow-up outside 1-7 day mandatory window, GUID_6: Day 8 follow-up outside window) and exclude 3 compliant patients (GUID_1: Day 2, GUID_4: Day 7 boundary, GUID_5: Day 1). Expected output is written to /home/ga/Documents/audit_cataracte_2024.csv with headers GUID, Nom, Prenom, Date_Chirurgie, Statut. Ground truth stored at /var/lib/medintux/ground_truth_audit.json contains the dynamically-generated GUIDs and expected compliance status for all 6 patients.
